text:
sures, unless aspected by Jupiter.
Mars.—This is generally a bad combination. The
person will be deprived of happiness from mother, relations
and friends, but will have success in the political line.
There will be quarrels with mother and domestic affairs go
awry. If Mars joins Rahu or Ketu, the man will have a
tendency for suicide. The person will own houses but will
not be happy on that account.
Mercury.—Shines well as an educationist or diplomat.
He will boldly criticise the Government. He will be held in
great esteem. Father will be a self-made man. He will
command a good conveyance. He will have taste for music
and other fine arts and will frequently travel to far off
countries. He will be witty in speech.
Jupiter.—Philosophically inclined, learned, happy,
possesses the favour of the ruling class; a terror to his
enemies; religiously inclined, respected and fortunate ;
peaceful domestic environments ; great spiritual
advancement.
Venus.
